title: Cardcaptor Sakura
sourceNotes: Original 1998-2000 anime (70 eps) adapts the full Cardcaptor Sakura manga (50 ch / 12 vols) with significant episodic padding. The Clear Card sequel anime (id 97881) adapts the 'Clear Card-hen' sequel manga, a separate AniList entry.

movies.title: Cardcaptor Sakura: The Movie
movies.note: Canon side story between S1 and S2.

movies.title: Cardcaptor Sakura the Movie 2: The Sealed Card
movies.note: Canon finale film concluding the original series.
